Bus Timings

Bus 77 Schedule Baniyas Square Metro to Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School and Back

June 29, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Hey, have you heard about Dubai Bus 77? It’s this super handy route that goes from Baniyas Square Metro all the way to Al Garhoud and Cambridge International School, then loops back. It’s a lifesaver for folks commuting between central Dubai and the Al Garhoud area.

You know how it is - it hits all those major spots, business districts, and transport hubs that everyone needs to get to. The best part? These buses run pretty often throughout the day, so you’re not left hanging around forever. It’s a real godsend for getting around one of Dubai’s busiest areas without losing your mind in traffic.

Route Name 77
Route Description Baniyas Square Metro - Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School - Baniyas Square Metro
Total Distance Approximately 20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 40 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 01:06 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 77

Bus 77 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 77 runs frequently, with the following schedules:

Bus 77 Timetable

For full schedule information, head over to the RTA website, or click here for Bus 77 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 77 is economical and adheres to Dubai’s public transportation pricing standards. A standard single-zone ticket costs AED 3. The pricing structure is designed to be budget-friendly, catering to various travel needs.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 77 does not offer an online booking option. Passengers can board the bus at any of the listed stops along the route. For real-time updates on bus timings and service status, the RTA Dubai app provides live tracking and schedule information, ensuring you stay informed about your journey. Additionally, the app can assist in planning your trip with up-to-date information on bus arrivals.

Bus Route

Bus 77 travels through a comprehensive route, linking several key locations across Dubai. The journey begins at Baniyas Square Metro and progresses through:

  1. Baniyas Square Metro

  2. Baniyas Square

  3. Memorial Plaza

  4. Union Metro · 1

  5. Ghurair City

  6. Al Rigga Metro

  7. Port Saeed, Masjid

  8. DNATA

  9. City Centre Metro · 2

  10. City Centre Metro · 1

  11. Flame Intersection

  12. Garhoud, Intersection

  13. Airport Terminal 1, External Parking

  14. Airport Terminal 3

  15. Emirates Airlines Headquarters

  16. Emirates Metro

  17. Dubai Municipality Garage

  18. Mawakeb School

  19. Sheikh Zayed Housing Program

  20. Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School

  21. American College of Dubai

  22. Grammar School

  23. Roads & Transport Authority HQ

  12. Ghurair City

  14. Union Metro · 3

  15. Baniyas Square

  16. Baniyas Square Metro

Bus 77 Station Overview

Baniyas Square Metro

The Baniyas Square Metro station is a major transit hub located in the heart of Dubai’s bustling downtown area. As a stop for Bus 77, it provides seamless connectivity with the Dubai Metro system, making it an essential junction for commuters traveling to and from various parts of the city.

The station features modern amenities, including ticket counters and information displays, which help facilitate smooth transfers and efficient travel. Its central location offers easy access to surrounding business and shopping districts, enhancing convenience for both daily commuters and visitors.

Al Rigga Metro Station A2 Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Rigga Metro Station A2 Bus Stop is a key transit point where Bus Routes C09 and 77 intersect. This stop provides essential connections within the Al Rigga area, facilitating seamless travel between different parts of the city. Its strategic location near the Al Rigga Metro Station enhances accessibility for commuters, offering convenient access to both local and extended destinations.

Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School

The Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School bus stop serves as a crucial point for Bus 77, particularly for students, parents, and staff associated with the nearby educational institution. This station is strategically positioned to provide easy access to the Cambridge International School and surrounding residential areas.

It is well-equipped to handle the high volume of passengers during peak school hours, offering reliable and frequent service to facilitate smooth commutes. The stop’s location within a vibrant community ensures that passengers have convenient access to local amenities and services.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several tourist attractions and notable destinations along the Bus 77 route: 1.

2.

  1. Dubai Airport: With stops at Airport Terminal 1, External Parking and Airport Terminal 3, this area is crucial for travelers and offers various amenities, including restaurants and shops.

4.

  1. Union Metro Station: A major transport hub located at Union Metro · 1, it provides access to various parts of Dubai and is close to the historic Al Ghurair Centre.

  2. Dubai Municipality Garage: The area around this stop is central and well-connected, with nearby cultural and historical sites.

These stops make Bus 77 a convenient route for accessing several key attractions and essential locations in Dubai.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus Route 77 from Baniyas Square Metro to Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School, and back is a delightful way to experience the heart of Dubai. The journey begins in Baniyas Square, a vibrant area filled with shops and local eateries that reflect the city’s rich culture.

Approaching Al Garhoud, you’ll see Cambridge International School, known for its modern facilities and diverse student body, along with several family-friendly parks in the area.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can easily travel to Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School, the furthest point on the Bus 77 route starting from Baniyas Square Metro. The fare for this journey ranges from AED 36 to AED 43, depending on factors such as traffic and the time of day. The app provides a convenient way to estimate your trip cost and plan your journey efficiently, ensuring a smooth travel experience to your destination.

Dubai Bus 77 connects Baniyas Square Metro to Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School, and other key spots in Dubai. It runs frequently with clear stops, offering easy access to landmarks and transport hubs. Affordable fares and real-time updates through the RTA Dubai app further enhance convenience. Bus 77 is a reliable choice for navigating Dubai’s urban landscape.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 29, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
